graduation_logic_notes: The July handbook academic landscape totals 120 credits across Year 1 to Year 3.
Final Year Project consists of IT Project I (3 credits) and IT Project II (4 credits).
Industrial Training is 6 credits and requires completed 86 credit hours.
Apprenticeship may be used as a replacement for Industrial Training with approval from the Industrial Training Coordinator.
